The Origin

As a barefoot girl
chasing train tracks
and light.

It was never about escaping. It was about expanding.

Through 30+ national parks. Through airports and oceans. Through long seasons of showing up for everyone but myself.

And now? My mind and body say stop. Without apology, I'm reclaiming the wander. Not to prove anything. Just to return to what has always been true — I need space. I need rest. I need beauty.

"This isn't a retreat.
It's a grown-woman pause."
6%
6% of national park visitors

Make It Make Sense

The most extraordinary landscapes on Earth.
Available to everyone.

The America the Beautiful Pass — $80 for an entire year — opens all 63 national parks, your whole vehicle, unlimited visits. The best kept secret in American travel. Not anymore.

Pass Price
Annual Pass Everyone — covers your whole vehicle · 400+ federal sites · 12 months $80 per year
Military Pass Free Active duty, Guard, Reserve & all dependents Free always
Every Kid Outdoors Free Every 4th grader & their whole family · one school year Free 4th grade year
Senior Lifetime Pass U.S. residents 62 and older — pay once, go forever $80 once. lifetime.
Access Pass Free U.S. residents with permanent disabilities — lifetime Free lifetime

All passes available at Recreation.gov or any park entrance.

Get Your Pass →
